introSection:
Kvasten ("The Broom") is an inverted steel roller coaster at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Sweden. The ride is a Suspended Family Coaster built by Vekoma. It opened on 28 April 2007.

The ride is 19.6 metres (64 ft) tall, 395 metres (1,296 ft) long, and operates at top speeds of 55 km/h (34 mph).
fullText:
Kvasten ("The Broom") is an inverted steel roller coaster at Gröna Lund in Stockholm, Sweden. The ride is a Suspended Family Coaster built by Vekoma. It opened on 28 April 2007.

The ride is 19.6 metres (64 ft) tall, 395 metres (1,296 ft) long, and operates at top speeds of 55 km/h (34 mph).
